attributes.action: Introduce a free 10-minute airport drop-off period across UK airports
attributes.additional_details: Millions of people use UK airports each year, including families, taxi drivers and disabled passengers. Many people are struggling with the rising cost of living and these short stay drop-off fees feel unfair. Airports should not charge high fees just to allow passengers to be dropped off safely.
attributes.background: UK airports now charge drivers between £7 and £10 simply to drop off passengers for a few minutes. We ask the Government to introduce regulations requiring all UK airports to provide a minimum 10-minute free drop-off period for passengers and prevent excessive charges.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Launch a review into airport terminal drop-off charges" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759700
